svg.text: Connected medallion workflow with native BigQuery serving and integrity controls
Control Layer Embedded Into The Workflow
Cloud Storage versioning, Pub/Sub retention, rebuild from silver
Event keys, stateful dedup, watermarking, idempotent BigQuery loads
Security Command Center, audit logs, suspicious deletes, access anomalies
1. Replay survives through Pub/Sub retention and bronze object recovery.
2. Dataflow suppresses duplicates before BigQuery gold-serving tables are built.
3. Unauthorized deletion or tampering is surfaced through audit and security telemetry.
4. BigQuery serving remains rebuildable from curated storage rather than being the only truth source.
